fields.title: Add classifySandboxFailure() with structured failure types
fields.description:
Replace boolean-only looksLikePolicyViolation() with richer classifier that returns structured failure info:

type SandboxFailure =
  | { kind: 'network'; subtype: 'dns' | 'blocked' | 'connect'; evidence: string; confidence: 'high' | 'medium' }
  | { kind: 'filesystem'; subtype: 'read' | 'write'; evidence: string; confidence: 'high' | 'medium' }
  | { kind: 'unknown'; evidence: string; confidence: 'low' };

Patterns to detect:
- Network/blocked (high): 'connection blocked by network allowlist' (ASRT explicit)
- Network/dns (medium): 'could not resolve host', 'temporary failure in name resolution', ENOTFOUND, EAI_AGAIN
- Filesystem/write (high): 'read-only file system', 'permission denied', 'operation not permitted'

Keep looksLikePolicyViolation() for approval prompt, use classifier for diagnostics.

DoD: function + unit tests covering all patterns
fields.close_reason: Implemented classifySandboxFailure() with tests; wired looksLikePolicyViolation to classifier
